health.offline: Backend unreachable — check LOCAL_IP in src/config.ts

login.tagline: Your pet's health assistant powered by Catties
login.toggleToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
login.toggleToSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.termsFooter: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

header.tagline: Your pet's health assistant powered by Catties

home.title: My Pets
home.noPetsBody: Add a pet to start tracking health scans.

onboarding.introBubbleWelcome: Hello! 👋 Welcome to Catties Health Care — a shared home where we join you to love, manage, and protect the health of your four-legged family. Let’s walk this care journey together and help your pets thrive!
onboarding.introBubbleClosing: Okie — now let’s create your first pet profile together!
onboarding.introBody: Mai is happy to accompany you on your pet health journey.
onboarding.introEnding: Okie, now let's start creating your first beloved pet profile together.
onboarding.profileGuideByMai: Dear pet parent, please help Mai fill in your pet's details.
onboarding.healthPromptBody: {{petName}} is on your profile. Would you like to run a quick health check with photos now?
onboarding.healthPromptFooter: You can always start a scan from the home screen under your pet.

healthCheck.title: Health Check for {{name}}
healthCheck.infoBanner: Provide clear photos to help Catties diagnose your pet as accurately as possible like Face, Ear, Eye, Body... Let's get started!
healthCheck.photoCountOne: {{count}} photo — tap area to add more
healthCheck.photoCountMany: {{count}} photos — tap area to add more
healthCheck.medicalHistoryPlaceholder: e.g., known drug allergies or previous conditions like skin fungus.
healthCheck.symptomsPlaceholder: Describe your pet's condition further (e.g., loss of appetite, lethargy, frequent scratching...)
healthCheck.photoRequiredError: * Please upload at least one photo

cat_rabies.label: Rabies
cat_rabies.detail: Typically given from about 12 weeks of age.

cat_felv.label: FeLV (feline leukemia)
cat_felv.detail: Optional; helps protect against FeLV-related disease.

healthCheck.cooldownHint: Please wait {{seconds}}s before starting another analysis.
healthCheck.analysisBusyHint: An analysis is running. Please wait for it to complete.

analysisProgress.title: Analyzing health check
analysisProgress.subtitle: Please wait while we process {{name}}'s data.
analysisProgress.failedBody: We could not complete this analysis. Please try again.

results.onboardingSubtitle: Here is what we found — tap Finish when you are ready.
results.needMoreDataBody: This result has low certainty. Please add clearer photos or more context.
results.emergencyBody: Potential high-risk signs detected. Seek in-person veterinary care as soon as possible.

history.title: Diagnostic History
history.subtitle: All previous scans — tap a row for details

profile.title: Pet profile
profile.healthHint: Recent scans for {{name}} — tap a row for details
profile.noHealthScansHint: Use Scan health above to run a check.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.message: Check your inbox to confirm, then use Sign in.

googleNotConfigured.title: Google sign-in
googleNotConfigured.message: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID (and iOS/Android client IDs for native builds) to a .env file, restart Expo, enable Google in Supabase Auth → Providers, then try again.

googleNoIdToken.title: Google sign-in
googleNoIdToken.message: No ID token returned. Check your Google OAuth client configuration.

googleNonce.title: Google sign-in (Supabase)
googleNonce.message: Turn ON "Skip nonce checks" for the Google provider in Supabase (Authentication → Providers → Google), then try again. Expo's Google flow and Supabase's nonce check do not line up without that setting.

appleUnavailable.title: Apple sign-in
appleUnavailable.message: Sign in with Apple is only available on supported iOS devices.

missingPetInfo.title: Missing info
missingPetInfo.message: Pet name and species are required.

exitSetup.title: Exit setup?
exitSetup.message: You can sign in again later to add your pet.

deletePet.title: Delete pet?
deletePet.message: Remove {{name}} and their data cannot be restored from the app.

signInRequired.title: Sign in required
signInRequired.message: Please sign in before choosing a pet avatar.

permissionAvatar.title: Permission needed
permissionAvatar.message: Please allow gallery access to set an avatar.

photosRequired.title: Photos required
photosRequired.message: Please upload at least one photo.

missingData.title: Missing data
missingData.message: Please sign in and select a pet.

analysisNeedMoreData.title: Need more data
analysisNeedMoreData.message: The photos/context are not enough yet. Please add clearer photos and details, then try again.

analysisNeedBetterPetPhoto.title: Could not identify dog/cat clearly
analysisNeedBetterPetPhoto.message: Please upload clearer photos focused on your dog or cat.

analysisCooldownFriendly.title: Please wait a bit
analysisCooldownFriendly.message: Your last check just finished. You can start a new one in {{seconds}} seconds.

analysisInProgressFriendly.title: Analysis is in progress
analysisInProgressFriendly.message: We are still processing your current check. Please wait a moment.

analysisRateLimitFriendly.title: Too many checks in a short time
analysisRateLimitFriendly.message: To keep the service stable, please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.

analysisModelUnavailableFriendly.title: System is being updated
analysisModelUnavailableFriendly.message: The AI model is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.

analysisQuotaFriendly.title: Server is busy
analysisQuotaFriendly.message: There are many checks running right now. Please try again in a few minutes.

systemErrorFriendly.title: System error
systemErrorFriendly.message: A system error occurred. Please try again shortly.
